ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the profile */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL of the social media profile */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the profile */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the user is following */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the profile is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the tweet was posted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tweet was posted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., mobile app, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the sentiment analysis result */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used for sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet from which the keyword was extracted */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword extracted from the tweet */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the keyword in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet from which the hashtag was extracted */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag extracted from the tweet */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the hashtag in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the tweet */,
  "like_time" TEXT /* Time the like was registered */,
  "is_liked" INTEGER /* Confirms if the like is still active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "retweet_time" TEXT /* Time the retweet was registered */,
  "is_retweeted" INTEGER /* Confirms if the retweet is still active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "anime_title" TEXT /* Title of the anime being recommended */,
  "recommendation_time" TEXT /* Time the recommendation was made */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "genre_match" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recommended anime matches the user's preferred genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anime" (
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anime show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the anime show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the anime show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anime show */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the anime */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the anime */,
  "episode_count" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the anime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anime_id")
)
